LanguageData.VFEArch_Asphalt.description: Industrial-style asphalt used to create roads and streets. Very easy to traverse for people and vehicles alike.
LanguageData.VFEArch_Asphalt.label: asphalt
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeGranite.label: granite bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeLimestone.label: limestone bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeMarble.label: marble bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeSandstone.label: sandstone bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeSlate.label: slate bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_BridgeSteel.label: steel bridge
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetBrown.description: Cheap looking, industry standard carpets for not-so-fancy places.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetBrown.label: brown carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetDarkRed.description: Plush carpet in a cozy dark shade of red.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetDarkRed.label: dark red carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineAmber.description: Rich orange carpet symbolising wealth and prosperity.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineAmber.label: fine amber carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineAshen.description: Fancy dark shade of carpet for the secret evil lair.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineAshen.label: fine ashen carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineAzure.description: Exquisite, sea-colored carpet for the high-tier professional environment.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineAzure.label: fine azure carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineBlonde.description: Eccentric, glowing yellow carpet, shining bright in daylight.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineBlonde.label: fine blonde carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineCrimson.description: Rich red carpet with deep crimson hue.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineCrimson.label: fine crimson carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineFeldgrau.description: Deep green carpet with blue hues, for the natural yet exquisite look.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineFeldgrau.label: fine feldgrau carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineHazel.description: Nutty, dark carpet that brings detailed memories of home.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineHazel.label: fine hazel carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineMilky.description: Subtle creamy carpet for the neutral yet posh rooms.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineMilky.label: fine milky carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineViridescent.descriptio: Natural and posh green carpet with beautiful patterns.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetFineViridescent.label: fine viridescent carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetGreenish.description: Neutral green carpet, excellent for hotels and beds and breakfasts.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetGreenish.label: greenish carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetOrange.description: Eccentric orange carpet for the business board rooms.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetOrange.label: orange carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetPurple.description: Soft purple carpet for the cozy bedroom look.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetPurple.label: purple carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetWhite.description: Corporate, hard to clean white carpet.
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetWhite.label: white carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CarpetYellow.label: yellow carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorGranite.label: granite cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorLimestone.label: limestone cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorMarble.label: marble cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorSandstone.label: sandstone cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_CobblestoneFloorSlate.label: slate cobblestone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_ConcreteFoundation.description: Foundations are structures that can be built on mud, quicksand etc. Foundation allows more rapid movement across these normally slowing ground types. Once built, they can support many structures, including heavy structures and any other type of wall. Foundations allow for easier building in desert and swampy biomes. Floors cannot be built atop foundations.
LanguageData.VFEArch_ConcreteFoundation.label: concrete foundation
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineGoldTile.label: fine gold tile
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineSilverTile.label: fine silver tile
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineSteelTile.label: fine steel tile
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloor.description: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloor.label: fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorBirch.description: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorBirch.label: birch fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorMahogany.descript: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorMahogany.label: mahogany fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorWalnut.descriptio: Beautiful wooden parquet, made with no compromises, for expressing economic status. Slow to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_FineWoodenFloorWalnut.label: walnut fine wooden floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_Grass.description: Field of grass with patches of soil here and there. Very pleasant to look at, it requires no resources to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_Grass.label: grass
LanguageData.VFEArch_Grass.tools.0.label: dirt
LanguageData.VFEArch_LawnPlot.description: Beautifully trimmed grass with very high beauty value. Requires tremendous amounts of work to construct.
LanguageData.VFEArch_LawnPlot.label: lawn plot
LanguageData.VFEArch_LawnPlot.tools.0.label: dirt
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerBrokenAsphalt.description: Old, broken apart asphalt, often found in the form of ancient highways around abandoned locations. Very easy to traverse for people and vehicles alike.
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerBrokenAsphalt.label: broken asphalt
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerPackedDirt.description: Packed dirt, slightly enhancing movement speed, often forming paths around places of interest.
LanguageData.VFEArch_PlayerPackedDirt.label: packed dirt
LanguageData.VFEArch_PolishedStoneFloorGranite.label: granite polished stone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_PolishedStoneFloorMarble.label: marble polished stone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_PolishedStoneFloorSlate.label: slate polished stone floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsGranite.label: granite slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsLimestone.label: limestone slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsMarble.label: marble slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsSandstone.label: sandstone slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_SlabsSlate.label: slate slabs
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquet.label: wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquetBirch.label: birch wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquetMahogany.label: mahogany wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodenParquetWalnut.label: walnut wooden parquet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorBirch.description: Wood plank flooring for that warm, homey feeling. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorBirch.label: birch wood floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorMahogany.descripti: Wood plank flooring for that warm, homey feeling. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorMahogany.label: mahogany wood floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorWalnut.description: Wood plank flooring for that warm, homey feeling. While it is quick to lay, it is also very flammable.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoodPlankFloorWalnut.label: walnut wood floor
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBlue.description: Toe-hugging wooly carpet in a cool blue color.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBlue.label: blue wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBrown.description: Cheap looking, industry standard carpets for not-so-fancy places.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetBrown.label: brown wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetCream.label: cream wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetDark.label: dark wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetDarkRed.description: Wooly carpet in a cozy dark shade of red.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetDarkRed.label: dark red wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreen.description: Naturalistic-feeling green wooly carpet. Earth tones, dude.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreen.label: green wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreenish.description: Neutral green carpet, excellent for hotels and beds and breakfasts.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetGreenish.label: greenish wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetOrange.description: Eccentric orange carpet for the business board rooms.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetOrange.label: orange wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetPurple.description: Soft purple carpet for the cozy bedroom look.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetPurple.label: purple wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetRed.description: Wooly carpet in a lovely rose hue.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetRed.label: red wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetWhite.description: Corporate, hard to clean white wooly carpet.
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetWhite.label: white wooly carpet
LanguageData.VFEArch_WoolCarpetYellow.label: yellow wooly carpet
